Infotexts.ntg.description.air_needle: Removes Pneumothoraxes on use, and turns a Tension Pneumothorax into a normal Pneumothorax.
Infotexts.ntg.description.air_drainage: Turns a Hemothorax into a Hemopneumothorax, and a Hemopneumothorax into a Pneumothorax.
Infotexts.ntg.description.oral_suction_tube: Medical Skill Check: 50. \nUsed to suck an occlusion out of an airway. Does not get consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.oral_suction_tube: [occlusion] Removes Occlusions and prevents their return for 2 minutes
Infotexts.ntg.applicationfailed.oral_suction_tube: [occlusion] Removes Occlusions and prevents their return for 2 minutes, but takes 10 seconds to apply.
Infotexts.ntg.description.chest_seal: Medical Skill Check: 5. \nUsed to cover the chest in the event of a sucking chest wound. Consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.chest_seal: [deep_penetration_injury] Removes Deep Penetration Injuries | [pneumothorax] Reduces Pneumothorax strength by 5
Infotexts.ntg.applicationfailed.chest_seal: [deep_penetration_injury] Removes Deep Penetration Injuries, but takes 10 seconds to apply. | [pneumothorax] Reduces Pneumothorax strength by 5, but takes 10 seconds to apply.
Infotexts.ntg.description.accuvac: Medical Skill Check: None. \nA machine that can be used to quickly clear the airway of both Occlusions and Obstructions. Requires batteries to be used.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.accuvac: [occlusion] Removes Occlusions and prevents their return for 2 minutes | [obstruction] Removes Obstructions and prevents their return for 2 minutes
Infotexts.ntg.description.laryngeal_tube: Medical Skill Check: 25. \nA tube inserted in the larynx of an individual to clear an obstruction. Consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.laryngeal_tube: [obstruction] Removes Obstructions and prevents their return for 2 minutes
Infotexts.ntg.description.aat_kit: Medical Skill Check: 5. \nAn all-in-one solution to pneumothoraces and its sister injuries. Loses 25% of its condition on use, therefor gets consumed after 4 uses - though it can be combined with other AAT kits. Used on the Torso.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.aat_kit: [tension_pneumothorax] Removes Tension Pneumothorax [hemopneumothorax] Removes Hemopneumothorax [hemothorax] Removes Hemothorax
Infotexts.ntg.applicationfailed.aat_kit: [tension_pneumothorax] Removes Tension Pneumothorax, but takes 10 seconds to apply | [hemopneumothorax] Removes Hemopneumothorax, but takes 10 seconds to apply | [hemothorax] Removes Hemothorax, but takes 10 seconds to apply
Infotexts.ntg.description.naso_airway: Medical Skill Check: 15. \nA tube inserted into the nose of an individual to clear an obstruction. Consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.naso_airway: [obstruction] Removes Obstructions and prevents their return for 2 minutes
Infotexts.ntg.description.cric_scalpel: Medical Skill Check: 90. \nA protected #10 scalpel used for preforming a cricothyrotomy. First step in a Cricothyrotomy, consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.cric_scalpel: [cricothyrotomy] Makes a Cirothyroid Incision, the first step in a Cricothyrotomy
Infotexts.ntg.applicationfailed.cric_scalpel: [arterial_bleeding] Takes 10 seconds to apply, and causes an Arterial Bleed
Infotexts.ntg.description.tracheal_hook: Medical Skill Check: 90. \nA Tracheal Hook used for preforming a cricothyrotomy. Second step in a Cricothyrotomy, consumed on use.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.tracheal_hook: [occlusion] Removes Occlusions and prevents their return for 2 minutes | [obstruction] Removes Obstructions and prevents their return for 2 minutes
Infotexts.ntg.description.cric_tube: Medical Skill Check: 90. \nA cricothyrotomy tube that allows the use of an Ambubag. Currently, there is no functionality that actually prevents it from being used so this feature is useless.
Infotexts.ntg.applicationsuccess.cric_tube: [ambubag] Allows the use of an Ambubag on the patient
Infotexts.ntg.causes.deep_penetration_injury: [open_wounds] A Gunshot Wound to the Torso
Infotexts.ntg.effects.deep_penetration_injury: [pneumothorax] Causes a Pneumothorax if one is not already present
Infotexts.ntg.treatments.occlusion: [cricothyrotomy] Performing a Cricothyrotomy | [accuvac] Using an Accuvac (prevents this affliction for 2 minutes) | [oral_suction_tube] Oral Suction Tube (prevents this affliction for 2 minutes)
Infotexts.ntg.treatments.obstruction: [cricothyrotomy] Performing a Cricothyrotomy | [laryngeal_tube] Using a Laryngeal Tube (prevents this affliction for 2 minutes) | [accuvac] Using an Accuvac (prevents this affliction for 2 minutes) | [naso_airway] Placing a Nasopharyngeal Airway (prevents this affliction for 2 minutes)
Infotexts.ntg.description.tension_pneumothorax: The filling of the pleural space with air.
Infotexts.ntg.description.hemopneumothorax: The active filling of the pleural space with blood.
Infotexts.ntg.causes.hemopneumothorax: [internal_bleeding] Internal Bleeding above 15% as well as | [tension_pneumothorax] Tension Pneumothorax at 100%
Infotexts.ntg.description.hemothorax: The pleural space is completely filled with blood.
Infotexts.ntg.causes.hemothorax: [blood_loss] Blood Loss above 15% as well as | [internal_bleeding] Internal Bleeding above 30% as well as | [hemopneumothorax] Hemopneumothorax at 100%
Infotexts.ntg.effects.hemothorax: [hyperventilation] Hyperventilation | [chest_pain] Chest Pain | [internal_bleeding] 100% Internal Bleeding | [increased_heartrate] Tachycardia
Infotexts.ntg.description.flail_chest: Paradoxical chest movement due to severe trauma to the torso. Indicative of fractured ribs.
Infotexts.ntg.description.cricothyrotomy: Medical Skill Check: 90. \nA procedure that can remove occlusions and obstructions.
Infotexts.ntg.steps.cricothyrotomy: [analgesia] 1a. Analgesia | [anesthesia] 1b. Anesthesia | [cric_scalpel] 2. Apply a Cricothyrotomy Scalpel to the Head | [tracheal_hook] 3. Apply a Tracheal Hook to the Head | [sutures] 4. Apply a Suture to remove the Cricothyrotomy Incision and the Tracheal Hook.
